summary: Video. A Fox News broadcast segment (anchor Bret Baier, a LIVE chyron, the FOX NEWS channel bug, and lower-thirds reading 'NOEM VISITS PRISON HOLDING SUSPECTED GANG MEMBERS' and 'DEPORTATION COLLABORATION') covering Secretary Noem's tour of El Salvador's CECOT prison, with embedded B-roll of shaved-head tattooed detainees behind bars and Noem walking the facility. Correspondent Griff Jenkins narrates and a Noem soundbite ('do not come to our country illegally... you will be removed and prosecuted') is played. It is a recorded TV news package, with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / LIVE; 'NOEM VISITS PRISON HOLDING SUSPECTED GANG MEMBERS'; 'DEPORTATION COLLABORATION - HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY VISITS EL SALVADOR PRISON'; 'TECOLUCA, EL SALVADOR'; 'THE FIRST 100 DAYS - IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN'; KRISTI NOEM | HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY
